task_objective: Style Transfer & 9-View 3x3 - Apply Figure 2 aesthetics onto Figure 1 shoe structure (FULLY PRESERVED)

input_assets.base_reference: Figure 1 shoe structure (sole shape, heel height, toe box, vamp, lace system, silhouette, proportions) - LOCKED
input_assets.aesthetic_reference: Figure 2 colors, pattern, texture, material style - applied to shoe only

workflow.step_1: Analyze Figure 2 aesthetics + parse Figure 1 shoe structure
workflow.step_2: Apply Figure 2 aesthetics onto Figure 1 structure, pixel-precise, NO structural deviation
workflow.step_3: Generate 9 views, assemble 3x3 grid with cinematic grading, luxury white space

outputs.view_1: Design Sketch - Shoe lineart-sketch based on Figure 1 structure with Figure 2 aesthetics, clean bg
outputs.view_2: Unmanned Render - Shoe render without foot, display stand presentation. SOURCE OF TRUTH
outputs.view_3: Display Stand - Shoe on premium display stand with studio lighting, boutique presentation
outputs.view_4: Back Heel View - Back view of shoe on foot, highlighting heel construction & rear design
outputs.view_5: Front Standing - Model foot (selected model_type) wearing shoe, front view, full shoe & ankle visible
outputs.view_6: Side Profile - Model foot wearing shoe, side view emphasizing sole curve, heel & silhouette
outputs.view_7: Walking Step - Model foot mid-step, showcasing shoe motion, dynamic stride energy
outputs.view_8: Crossed Ankles - Seated model with ankles crossed, relaxed elegant posture, shoe detail emphasis
outputs.view_9: Stair Step - Model foot on stair edge, dramatic angle emphasizing sole, heel & shoe profile

output_requirements: NO text/labels/watermarks; Figure 1 shoe structure LOCKED; Figure 2 aesthetics pixel-precise
Model foot: Asian/Caucasian/African female, auto-adapted skin tone, consistent across all views
SFW; realistic material (leather, suede, mesh, patent); consistent lighting; NO oily shine; NO oversaturation
Premium 3x3 - cinematic grading, luxury white space, footwear editorial standard
